questionHtml: State the name of the products of the reaction between benzene, C6H6 and bromine, Br2 in presence of the catalyst, FeBr3.
markschemeHtml:
bromobenzene AND HBr ✓

 

Accept structural formula of bromobenzene or correct reaction
